nasb.text: You have by Your power redeemed Your people, The sons of Jacob and Joseph. Selah.

esv.text: You with your arm redeemed your people, the children of Jacob and Joseph. Selah

cnv.text: 你曾用你的膀臂救贖你的子民， 就是雅各和約瑟的子孫。

ccb.text: 你以大能救赎了你的子民， 就是雅各和约瑟的后代。（细拉）

csbs.text: 你用膀臂赎回你的子民， 就是雅各和约瑟的子孙。细拉
